overview: I built Dino, a Dean Martin-inspired AI dining concierge for Las Vegas using FastAPI, Google Maps Places API, and Claude Code. Shifted fully from writing Python to writing specs — Claude Code handled all implementation across a 5-day build ending in a live Railway deployment.

keyPoints.title: Claude Code shifted my role from coder to spec writer
CLAUDE.md at 75 lines drove entire project architecture
Google Calendar deep links beat OAuth — zero auth infrastructure
System prompt defines Dino's voice, flow, and edge cases
Railway required for persistent FastAPI process — not Streamlit
